snapshot.scope: Manual review binds public/documentation surfaces, control manifests, verifier code and shared executable schemas; automated gates execute current implementation evidence separately.

reviewers.task: macOS-first Reader, Activity, Voice, Skills and diagnostics UI integration review
reviewers.independence: Development froze the exact 18-path integration after independent review; UI Design reproduced both hashes and accepted the exact candidate. Planning changed only existing owner, evidence, semantic and review artifacts, never those frozen bytes.

dimensions.summary: The UI owner now locates real Reader copy, composer processing, compact Activity/Undo and typed diagnostics while Voice, Skills, updates and unowned mutations remain honest unavailable surfaces.
Renderer behavior stays on existing activity, diagnostics, support-bundle, Job and clipboard ownership; no service, IPC, schema, permission, storage, dependency or update contract changes.

Five exact UI selectors project only to existing partial Settings, diagnostics, Job, Reader and Activity rows; semantic lock v3 has 1,228 claims and every Requirement, Exit and Phase status remains unchanged.
The exact integration has focused UI/diagnostics evidence, authoritative 116-file/1,352-test coverage, typecheck, build, development launch, unified Agent smoke and UI Design exact-hash acceptance.
No document or decision is added; three concise owner updates, five selectors and semantic-neutral compression keep every fixed budget green.

verification.evidence: The exact combined candidate passes docs, decisions, UI visual, independent review, TRC-001 through TRC-005, CON-001 through CON-004, dependencies, fixtures, boundaries, no telemetry, source artifacts, LEN-001 through LEN-005 and all quality dimensions.

UI focus 9 files/116 tests, delegated UI 9/124, diagnostics 5/77, full 116 passed/1 skipped files and 1,352 passed/1 skipped tests, typecheck, build, development launch and unified Agent smoke pass; exact 232464d5/00205d7c identities are independently accepted.

verification.command: npm run verify:ui-visual && npm run verify:traceability && npm run verify:contracts
verification.evidence: The visual contract passes unchanged; semantic lock v3/1,228 and CON-001 through CON-004 pass with Requirement, Exit and Phase states unchanged.
LEN-001 through LEN-005 pass within the fixed entry, trace and governed Markdown budgets.

coordination.taskTitle: Reader, Activity, Voice, Skills and diagnostics UI integration
coordination.compatibility: The candidate binds approved Reader, Activity, processing and diagnostics presentation to existing typed owners while keeping Voice, Skills, updates and mutation capabilities unavailable; no service, IPC, schema, dependency, permission or storage change.
coordination.acknowledgement: Development froze exact 232464d5/00205d7c bytes after independent and UI Design review. Planning bound only existing UI/quality/playbook owners, evidence, semantic lock and this recipe without changing the 18 paths.

nonBlockingRisks: Voice speech service/permission/transcript and E2.04 remain planned; Skills inventory/lifecycle and updates remain unavailable with no capability credit.
Reader edit/reveal/transforms, broader Activity/progress and other mutation/exception breadth remain open despite local copy and compact Undo.
Windows/Linux qualification remains deferred under macOS-first sequencing with no platform claim.
